label: pure-UI
title: Add confetti animation to the login page
body:
# Add confetti animation to the login page

Add a confetti burst that plays the first time a user lands on `/login`.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] AC-1: Confetti canvas renders within 500 ms of the login page load.
- [ ] AC-2: Animation settles within 7 seconds and does not block form input.
- [ ] AC-3: Screenshot captured 2 s after load shows the confetti in flight.
